Understand Anything

Turn any codebase, knowledge base, or docs into an interactive knowledge graph you can explore, search, and ask questions about.
Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Copilot, Gemini CLI, and more.

# CodeGraph

repos.description: Ghostty-based macOS terminal with vertical tabs and notifications for AI coding agents
features: Ghostty-based macOS terminal with vertical tabs and notifications for AI coding agents
**Browser import** — Import cookies, history, and sessions from Chrome, Firefox, Arc, and 20+ browsers so browser panes start authenticated
**Custom commands** — Define project-specific actions in `cmux.json`（https://cmux.com/docs/custom-commands） that launch from the command palette
**Scriptable** — CLI and socket API to create workspaces, split panes, send keystrokes, and automate the browser
**Native macOS app** — Built with Swift and AppKit, not Electron. Fast startup, low memory.
**Ghostty compatible** — Reads your existing `~/.config/ghostty/config` for themes, fonts, and colors
